text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Nice work, Trainer! It seems like<n>you're giving it
your all every day!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Not only has your trainee grown<n>remarkably, but,
as someone who's<n>known you since you first
came to the<n>academy...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm very happy to say that your own<n>growth has
also been quite<n>remarkable! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I may just be the director's<n>secretary, but I hope
you'll allow me<n>to keep watching over you from
here<n>on out as well.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly looking forward to seeing<n>what you do
in the future!
